Damage increases by 18% against monsters.

Deals 360% of Base Damage + 16 damage to the designated target. The skill's effect changes based on the prerequisite and can be used 2 times in succession.

Thrust: Off-hand Weapon
- Used by default or after the 1st or 2nd hit of Consecutive Blows, and briefly approaches the target.

Uppercut (Wrath Attack): Main Weapon
- Used after Unshakable Stance with directional input, Mobile Strike, Short Jab, or Explosive Flurry, and has a 70% chance to apply a Collision: Prone effect for 2s.

Smash Down: Off-hand Weapon
- Used after Unshakable Stance and the 3rd hit of Consecutive Blows, dealing the same damage to a 4m area around the target.

When using Eclipse of Blood, changes to Consecutive Claws.

Charges toward the designated target and attacks 3 times. Each attack deals 120% of Base Damage + 16 damage. Can be used an additional time within 6s. Upon additional use, the final hit detonates the caster's Burst and Ignite applied to the target, increasing damage by 15% per stack of Burst and Ignite and removing them. Upon additional use while behind the enemy, increases Critical Hit Chance by 300. Reduces cooldown by 5s if the damaged target has Weaken: Brand.

Damage increases by 5% against monsters.

Each attack detonates the caster's Burst and Ignite applied to the target, increasing damage by 20% per stack of Burst and Ignite and removing them. Reduces cooldown by 5s if the damaged target has Weaken: Brand.

Damage increases by 59% against monsters.

When the skill lands as a Heavy Attack on the side or back of the target, has a(n) 30% chance to deal additional 57% of Base Damage + 8 damage. For targets with less than 30% Health, the attack always triggers from a Heavy Attack. The skill can be activated up to 3 times per skill.

Does not apply additional effects.

Ineligible skills
Mother Nature's Protest, Umbral Spirit, Thunder Spirit, Ray of Disaster.

Does not apply additional effects from the second projectile.

tooltipOptions.name: For every 1 Mana regenerated, Activation Rate ▲

levels.description:

Using one of the following skills within 5s since the Cooldown reset, the effect is enhanced once.

Decisive Sniping
Depending on Charging Time, deals from 150% to 450% of Base Damage per second for 3s.
Flash Wave
Damage and continuous healing increase by 20%.
Healing Touch
After the effect is applied, restores Health equal to 150% of Base Damage + 650 per Healing Touch stack. Also, the remaining cooldown time of Limit Break decreases by 10s.
Purifying Touch
Removes every debuff from a target. After the removal, the remaining cooldown time of Limit Break decreases by 10s.

Upon using Staff skills and gaining a certain number of Elemental stacks, increases Species Damage Boost by 30 for 4s, while the remaining cooldown of other Staff Skills are reduced.
Consecutive use skills grant Elemental stacks only during the first time they are used. After applying a cooldown reduction, additional Elemental stacks cannot be gained for 10s.

5 Fire Elements = Ice Skills remaining cooldown -7.6%
2 Ice Elements = Lightning Skills remaining cooldown -7.6%
7 Lightning Elements = Fire Skills remaining cooldown -7.6%

Defends against attacks. Increases Skill Damage Boost by 11% for skills used within 5s after defending against a Fury Attack while stationary. Deals damage equal to 230% of Base Damage + 27 to targets within Attack Range, and Iron Point Parry changes to Murderous Draw. On defending against a Fury Attack within 0.5s, deals damage with a(n) 80% chance to Stun the target for 3s. Targets immune to Stun are Shocked for 6s. Wrath Attacks cannot be defended.
When used during a movement input, it blocks attacks while moving 4m in that direction for 0.5s. Upon defending against a Fury or Wrath Attack, Charging Draw is activated for 3s.

Skillful Response
Use when you're inflicted with Collision: Prone by a monster's attack to immediately remove Collision: Prone and use Roll.
Cooldown 30s

On defending against a Fury Attack within 0.5s, deals damage with a(n) 80% chance to Stun the target for 3s. Targets immune to Stun are Shocked for 6s. Wrath Attacks cannot be defended.
When used during a movement input, it blocks attacks while moving 4m in that direction for 0.5s. Upon defending against a Fury or Wrath Attack, Charging Draw is activated for 3s.

Toggles between Activate and Deactivate.
While activated, each projectile attack consumes 16 Mana to attack with an additional projectile. This effect does not benefit from Mana Cost Efficiency. Automatically deactivates when current Mana falls below 10% of Max Mana. When two or more attributes are acquired simultaneously, each use cycles through attributes in the order Gale > Flame > Frost > Lightning > Deactivate.

Gale Shot
Deals 21% of Base Damage. 15% chance to apply Gale effect for 6s

Flame Shot
Deals 21% of Base Damage. 15% chance to apply the same Weaken: Ignition effect as the Serial Fire Bombs skill for 3s

Frost Shot
Deals 28% of Base Damage. 30% chance to apply Frost effect and Weaken effect that reduces Movement Speed by 10% for 1s. If the effect is already active, extends Duration by 0.5s

Lightning Shot
Deals 30% of Base Damage. 8% chance to deal an additional 120% of Base Damage. If target is Wet or under your Frost, chains once to other foes within 5m radius

Applies Satellite to a party member for 6s. The following skills for you and your party member are boosted when a party member with Satellite is present.
Only one Satellite may be applied at a time to a target.

Satellite Copy
Can only be used on party members with Satellite. Grants Satellite for 3s to all party members within the caster's Attack Range from the target.

Basic Attack
While the effect is active, Basic Attacks fire an additional projectile from the Satellite, dealing damage equal to Dimensional Bomb.

Stellar Dash
Fires an additional projectile from a Satellite within 30m from the location that the caster designated while using Stellar Dash, dealing 106% + 23 damage.

Damage increases by 4% against monsters.

Does not apply additional effects from additional projectiles.

Applies Guardian Satellite to a party member for 6s. The following skills for you and your party member are boosted when a party member with Guardian Satellite is present.
Only one Guardian Satellite may be applied at a time to a target.

Guardian Satellite Copy
Can only be used on party members with Guardian Satellite. Grants Guardian Satellite for 3s to all party members within the caster's Attack Range from the target.

Distortion Veil
Applies Distortion Veil to the party member with Guardian Satellite within 30m when the caster uses Distortion Veil.
Targets that receive the effect have their Guardian Satellite effect removed and cannot receive another user's Distortion Veil effect for 20s.

Orb Effect
Boosts Distortion Veil Shield Health by 20% per Orb within 30m upon use of Distortion Veil. Only applies the Orb Effect once per skill use.

Applies Guardian Satellite to a party member for 6s. The following skills for you and your party member are boosted when a party member with Guardian Satellite is present.
Only one Guardian Satellite may be applied at a time to a target.

Guardian Satellite Copy
Can only be used on party members with Guardian Satellite. Grants Guardian Satellite for 3s to all party members within the caster's Attack Range from the target.

Distortion Veil
Applies Distortion Veil to the party member with Guardian Satellite within 30m when the caster uses Distortion Veil.
Targets that receive the effect have their Guardian Satellite effect removed and cannot receive another user's Distortion Veil effect for 20s.

Defends against attacks. On defending against a Fury Attack while stationary, Magic, Melee, and Ranged Defense increase by 100 for 3s (up to 5 stacks), and Overtaker changes to Agile Shot for 3s. Increases Magic, Melee, and Ranged Critical Hit Chance by 410 for 5s, if a Fury Attack was defended within 0.5s. Wrath Attacks can't be defended.
Use with the directional buttons to defend against attacks while moving 4m in the designated direction for 0.5s. On defending against a Fury or Wrath Attack, Overtaker changes to Swift Evasion for 3s. Additionally, the next skill attack that hits within 5s lands as a Critical Hit.

Skillful Response
Use when you're inflicted with Collision: Prone by a monster's attack to immediately remove Collision: Prone and use Roll.
Cooldown 30s

Use when you're inflicted with Collision: Prone by a monster's attack to immediately remove Collision: Prone and use Roll.

Coats the daggers with poison for 9s to apply Weaken: Poison to all following attacks. Poison deals 6% of Base Damage + 1 damage per stack per sec for 2.3s. The damage decreases targets' Health Regen by 4% per stack and ignores PvP target's Shield Health. Stacks up to 20 times.

Using the skill again within 9s activates a stabbing attack with both hands, dealing 110% of Base Damage + 4 damage with each hand and then dealing additional 180% of Base Damage + 7 damage with a spin. On hit against enemies with 20 Poison stacks, consumes 10 stacks of Poison from the target and increases Heavy Attack Damage by 20% for 6s and against enemies with 20 Thunderclouds stacks, consumes 10 stacks of Thunderclouds and increases Critical Damage by 15% for 6s. Increases the spin attack damage by 5% per Poison stack.

Increases damage by 7% against monsters.

Adds Weaken: Thunderclouds effect to all attacks for 9s. Thunderclouds lasts for 6s, and decreases Melee, Ranged, Magic Endurance by 6 per stack. Stacks up to 20 times, up to a maximum total of 800 endurance reduction from all user-inflicted stacks.

Reusing the skill within 9s will trigger a stabbing attack with both hands, each attack dealing 110% +4 damage, then dealing an additional 180% +7 damage. Deals 220% of Base Damage with a(n) 80% chance to apply Collision: Push. Has the same chance to Push nearby targets that collide with the main target and deals lesser damage to them. Targets that collide with a wall are Stunned for 3s. While in the Collision state, the most disadvantageous direction to the target will be applied.

A special growth skill that can only be upgraded with Precious Growth Book: Omnipotence

Wrath Attack

After casting for a certain time, flies up toward the designated target and descends, dealing 200% of Base Damage to up to 7 enemies within a 5m radius and has a(n) 45% chance to apply Fear for 4s. Additionally, applies a Weaken effect that reduces Movement Speed by 60% for 4s. After ascending, the skill cannot be canceled with other skills, and you cannot be targeted and become immune to all status effects before landing. Ignores the target's Block Chance.

Creates a Dimensional Orb with a(n) 4m radius and sends it rolling forward. The Dimensional Orb deals 400% of Base Damage + 142 to enemies in its path, and has a(n) 80% chance to Weaken enemies in its path, reducing their Movement Speed by 40% for 3s. Charging time increases Attack Range by up to 150%, damage by up to 200%, and Movement Speed Reduction by up to 200%.

Orb Effect
The Dimensional Orb pulls in and collapses Orbs within 6m. Each Orb has a(n) 80% chance to apply enemies in its path with Collision: Pull, pulling them in. Fully charged Dimensional Orbs will drag the pulled enemy all the way to the end of its path.

All Orbs within Attack Range collapse after destruction for 1.5s.

Orb Effect
Collapsed Orbs leave behind a 4m-radius area of Supernova Collapse for 5s. It explodes on expiry, dealing 360% of Base Damage + 140 damage. Ignores the target's Block Chance.

Link Effect
Applies a Link Effect if Orbs are within 6m from one another to buff Supernova Collapse's area.
When 1 Orb is linked, the effect range increases to 5m, and deals 36% of Base Damage + 14 damage per 0.5s.
When 2 Orbs are linked, the effect range increases to 6m, and has a(n) 80% chance to apply Collision: Pull to all enemies within range when the area is created, pulling them to the center.

If there is no Orb by the time casting is completed, cooldown decreases by 95%.

Fires an arrow at the target location, dealing 100% of Base Damage to the first enemy hit and applying Weaken that decreases Movement Speed by 37.5% to all enemies within a 3m radius around the target. After 2s, applies Collision: Pull with a(n) 70% chance to pull all enemies within range to the center while dealing additional damage equal to 100% of Base Damage. Deals 200% of Base Damage + 14 damage and has a(n) 100% chance to Weaken and Mark the target for 3s. Each attack that hits a marked target deals 15% of Base Damage + 1 damage as additional damage. Upon damaging a Marked target, damage accumulates up to 50000% of Base Damage. When the Mark ends, it explodes, dealing 10% of the accumulated damage as additional damage. The Mark stacks up to 2 times and explodes upon stacking to deal damage and the total accumulated damage resets. Reduces Marked target's Healing Received by 80%. The Mark's accumulating damage can only be applied to one target at a time.

Does not apply additional effects from Mark's additional damage.

Swings the spear while stationary to deal 150% of Base Damage to enemies within range and applies Weaken: Burst. Has a(n) 80% chance to apply Collision: Push. The Pushed target is Stunned for 1s. Pushed targets turn to the moving direction. Targets that collide with a wall are Stunned for 1.4s.

If Tempest Strike hits a target affected by Bind, Fear, Sleep, Stun or has a Brand applied by the user, has a(n) 80% chance to apply Collision: Prone for 1.4s. While in the Collision state, the most disadvantageous direction to the target will be applied.

Has a(n) 100% chance to apply Weaken: Mark on the target for 9s. Mark reduces the target's Shield Health received by 80%. Attacking the Marked target increases the caster's Magic, Melee, and Ranged Critical Hit Chance by 100, and by 220 when attacking from the side or back. In addition, increases the caster's and party members' Magic, Melee, and Ranged Hit Chance by 100 against Marked targets. Each Critical Hit decreases all skill cooldowns by 1% for the caster and party members. When Mark is applied to a monster, the cooldown reduction amount is halved, up to 100 times. Skill cooldown reduction effects do not stack.

Defends against attacks. On defending against a Fury Attack while stationary, deals 115% of Base Damage + 7 to the attacker. On blocking a Fury Attack within 0.5s, Vampiric Attack is also activated for 3s. Wrath Attacks cannot be defended.
Use the directional buttons to defend against attacks while moving 4m to the designated location for 0.5s. On defending against a Fury or Wrath Attack, deals 230% of Base Damage + 14 to the current target, and Rupturing Parry changes to Binding Blow for 3s. Activates Off-Hand Weapon Attack for 3s.
Attacking a target within 6m with Rupturing Parry has a(n) 80% chance of applying Collision: Push. While in the Collision state, the most disadvantageous direction to the target will be applied. Targets that collide with walls are Stunned for 3s.

Vampiric Attack
On attack hit, regenerates Health equal to 5% of the damage dealt.

Skillful Response
Use when you are inflicted with Collision: Prone by a monster's attack to immediately remove Collision: Prone and use Roll.
Cooldown 30s

Defends against attacks. On defending against a Fury Attack while stationary, 180 Mana regenerates. On defending against a Fury Attack within 0.5s, Block Blade changes to Poison Dagger for 3s. Wrath Attacks can't be defended.
Use with the directional buttons to defend against attacks while moving 4m to the designated direction for 0.5s. On defending against a Fury or Wrath Attack, becomes Stealthed for 3s and increases Mana Regen by 450. Block Blade changes to Poison Dagger. The first attack while Stealthed is a Critical Hit. Stealth is canceled if the user attacks or Morphs.

Skillful Response
Use when you're inflicted with Collision: Prone by a monster's attack to immediately remove Collision: Prone and use Roll.
Cooldown 30s

Attack Speed increases by 100%. Attacks every enemy within range 12 consecutive times, dealing 57% of Base Damage + 9. When hit, damage increases by 8%, and applies Weaken: Frost, decreasing the target's Movement Speed by 5%. Applies Bind: Icebound to the target for 3s at 10 stacks. When Frost is applied to a Frozen target, Icebound Bind duration increases by 0.2s. Increases Movement Speed by 11%. The user can pass through targets.

Charges in the specified direction for 3.3 times the Attack Range, dealing 200% of Base Damage + 19 damage to up to 5 targets with a(n) 70% chance to apply Collision: Push. Stuns targets for 2s if pushed into a wall. Increases Base Damage by 40 for 6s against Collision-immune targets. While in the Collision state, the most disadvantageous direction to the target will be applied.

Increases Off-hand Double Attack Chance by 30% for 6s. For 6s, successfully applying a Weaken effect decreases all skill cooldowns by 0.15s. When 2 or more stacks of Weaken are applied, cooldowns decrease by only 0.03s. The cooldown reduction effect can trigger up to 10 times per sec and does not affect Selfless Diffusion. Each successful attack increases the remaining duration of all Weaken effects you applied to the target by 0.05s, up to a maximum of 100 times.

Increases Block Chance by 13% for 8s. On evading an attack, using Shield Block, or blocking with a Defense skill within 1.1 times the Attack Range (3.3 times the Attack Range for Magic and Ranged), performs a counterattack that deals damage equal to 125% of Damage Reduction to the attacker. The counterattack damage is not affected by Critical Hit Chance and Heavy Attack Chance. Shares a cooldown with Threat Boost, Brilliant Moonlight.

For 8s, on evading an attack, using Shield Block, or blocking with a Defense Skill within 1.35 times the Attack Range (3.3 times for Magic and Ranged), performs a counterattack that deals 125% of Damage Reduction as damage to the attacker. The counterattack cannot trigger Critical Hits or Heavy Attacks.
On a successful counterattack hit, reduces Bonus Damage by 5 for 6s. Stacks up to 20 times.
When hit, stores received damage up to 100% of Max Health, and when reused within 6s, deals 15% of stored damage + 200% of Base Damage to all enemies within Attack Range, then removes the effect.
Increases Block Chance by 13% for 3s after the effect is removed.

Defends against attacks. On defending against a Fury Attack while stationary, 270 Health regenerates, creates a shield equal to 20% of Max Health for 3s, and Shield Survival Technique changes to Retaliatory Strike for 1.5s. Wrath Attacks can't be defended.
Use with the directional buttons to defend against attacks while moving 4m in the designated direction for 0.5s. On defending against a Fury or Wrath Attack, creates a shield equal to 20% of Max Health for 3s and Shield Survival Technique changes to Retaliatory Strike for 1.5s.

Skillful Response
Use when you're inflicted with Collision: Prone by a monster's attack to immediately remove Collision: Prone and use Roll.
Cooldown 30s

Defends against attacks. On defending against a Fury Attack while stationary, deals 120% of Base Damage + 12 to the target with a(n) 80% chance to use an Ice skill with a Weakening effect that decreases Movement Speed by 40% for 3s. On defending against a Fury Attack within 0.5s, Mystic Shield changes to Lightning Pick for 3s. Wrath Attacks can't be defended.
Use with the directional buttons to defend against attacks while moving 4m in the designated direction for 0.5s. On defending against a Fury or Wrath Attack, Mystic Shield changes to Scorching Sphere for 3s.

Defends against attacks. On defending against a Fury Attack while stationary, reduces Starcalling's cooldown by 50%. On defending against a Fury Attack within 0.5s, increases Skill Damage Boost by 200 for 3s. Wrath attacks can't be defended.

Use with the directional buttons to defend against attacks while moving 4m in the designated direction for 0.5s. Upon defending against a Fury or Wrath Attack, launches a projectile if the target is within Attack Range to deal 160% of Base Damage + 57 to a target within a 5m radius. Projectiles are launched only once. Also, Barrier is converted to Afterimage for 3s.

Skillful Response
Use when you're inflicted with Collision: Prone by a monster's attack to immediately remove Collision: Prone and use Roll.

Grants an ally 5 stacks of Restoration for 9s. Restores Health by 90% of Base Damage + 240 Health when attacked while Restoration effect is active. Defending a Fury or Wrath attack with Defensive Skills restores Health without consuming a stack. When current Health is less than 50%, multiplies Health restoration by 2 and when current Health is less than 25%, multiplies Health restoration by 3. Only one Restoration effect can be applied to a single target, and Health restoration activates max 1 time per sec.

A special skill that can only be upgraded with Precious Growth Book: Omnipotence.

Creates a 5m radius Guardian Defensive Wall at the target location, absorbing 40% of damage taken by party members within the area. This area lasts for 5s, and has a Health of 2000% of Base Damage + 20000. Affected targets cannot receive new Guardian Defensive Wall effect for 45s.

Orb Effect
Upon summoning the Guardian Defensive Wall, each Orb within the area is consumed and boosts the Guardian Defensive Wall's Health by 12%.

Defends against attacks.

If used while stationary, blocking a Fury Attack stacks Block Chance by 1% for 3s, up to 10 times, and changes Unshakable Stance to Iron Mountain Blow.
Wrath attacks cannot be blocked. A successful Perfect Defense applies 2 stacks.

If used while pressing a directional input, moves 4m in the designated direction over 0.5s while defending against attacks. For 3s afterward, Uppercut and One-Inch Punch can be used as chain skills.

Blocking a Fury Attack or Wrath attack grants the Block Chance Increase effect and activates Iron Mountain Blow as a chain skill.

While Eclipse of Blood is active, activates Evasive Maneuver as a chain skill instead of Iron Mountain Blow.

Skillful Response
If used when affected by Collision: Prone from a monster attack, immediately removes Collision: Prone and performs a roll.
Cooldown 30s

If used while pressing a directional input, moves 4m in the designated direction over 0.5s while defending against attacks. For 3s afterward, Uppercut and One-Inch Punch can be used as chain skills.

Blocking a Fury Attack or Wrath attack grants the Block Chance Increase effect and activates Iron Mountain Blow as a chain skill.

While Eclipse of Blood is active, activates Evasive Maneuver as a chain skill instead of Iron Mountain Blow.

levels.description:
Resets the cooldown of the recently used skill.
This is only available when a resettable skill exists, and it is not affected by the Skill cooldown stat or Skill cooldown reduction.

Non-Applicable Skills
Immortal Pride, Devastating Smash, Frost Smokescreen, Judgment Lightning, Strafing, Arrow Vortex, Death From Above, Fountain of Life, Star Destroyer, Time Dilation, Echoes of Distortion

When one of the following skills is used within 5s since the Cooldown reset, the effect is enhanced once.

Decisive Sniping
Depending on Charging Time, deals from 150% to 450% of Base Damage per second for 3s.
Flash Wave
The damage and continuous healing increase by 20%.
Healing Touch
After the effect is applied, heals Health by 150% of Base Damage + 650 per Healing Touch stack. Also, the remaining cooldown time of Limit Break decreases by 10s.
Purifying Touch
Removes every debuff from a target. After the removal, the remaining cooldown time of Limit Break decreases by 10s.
levels.effect: Can be boosted by Limit Break

levels.description:
Applies Guardian Satellite to a party member for 6s. The following skills for you and your party member are boosted when a party member with Guardian Satellite is present.
Only one Guardian Satellite may be applied at a time to a target.

Guardian Satellite Copy
Can only be used on party members with Guardian Satellite. Grants Guardian Satellite for 3s to all party members within the caster's Attack Range from the target.

Distortion Veil
Applies Distortion Veil to the party member with Guardian Satellite within 30m when the caster uses Distortion Veil.
Targets that receive the effect have their Guardian Satellite effect removed and cannot receive another user's Distortion Veil effect for 20s.

Orb Effect
Boosts Distortion Veil Shield Health by 20% per Orb within 30m upon use of Distortion Veil. Only applies the Orb Effect once per skill use.
Increases Satellite duration by 1.5s.

levels.description:
Stabs with a spear 2 times. Each attack deals 120% of Base Damage + 11 damage. On Critical Hit, applies Weaken: Ignite. At 5 Burst stacks, increases damage against the enemy with Burst stacks by 20%. Ignite lasts for 9s, and each stack deals 3.4% of Base Damage + 15 damage per sec. Stacks up to 10 times. Ignite Damage ignores Shield Health of PvP targets. At 10 stacks, explodes to deal 460% of Base Damage + 266 damage to targets within 3m. All skills' Weaken: Ignite effects are identical to that of Flaming Arc. Can use Spiral Slash afterwards.

For 8s, on evading an attack, using Shield Block, or blocking with a Defense Skill within 1.35 times the Attack Range (3.3 times for Magic and Ranged), performs a counterattack that deals 125% of Damage Reduction as damage to the attacker. The counterattack cannot trigger Critical Hits or Heavy Attacks.
On a successful counterattack hit, reduces Bonus Damage by 5 for 6s. Stacks up to 20 times.
When hit, stores received damage up to 100% of Max Health, and when reused within 6s, deals 15% of stored damage + 200% of Base Damage to all enemies within Attack Range, then removes the effect.
Increases Block Chance by 13% for 3s after the effect is removed.
